hotels.name: Hilton Hotel Kuching
hotels.location: Hilton Kuching, Jalan Tunku Abdul Rahman, Kuching City Center,93100 Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia
hotels.description: Experience the epitome of luxury and comfort at Hilton Kuching, where impeccable service and stunning views of the city and Sarawak River await you. Our hotel offers a range of elegant rooms and suites, each designed to provide a relaxing retreat with modern amenities. Whether you're here for business or leisure, Hilton Kuching promises an unforgettable stay with its world-class facilities, including a rooftop pool, spa, and multiple dining options that showcase the best of local and international cuisine.

rooms.description: A room features two twin beds and floor-to-ceiling windows with views of either the city or the Sarawak River.

hotels.name: Sheraton Kuching Hotel
hotels.location: 2, Jln Padungan, 93100 Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia
features: Rooftop pool with panoramic city views
Multiple restaurants offering local and international cuisine
hotels.description: Experience a new standard of modern elegance at Sheraton Kuching Hotel, a striking landmark in the city center defined by its iconic curved architecture. Located within the 'Golden Triangle', this 5-star destination places you just steps from the Kuching Waterfront  and the vibrant shops of Jalan Padungan. Unwind in sophisticated guest rooms featuring sleek, contemporary designs and panoramic views of the Sarawak River or the sprawling city skyline. Whether you are taking a sunset dip in the spectacular rooftop infinity pool on the 23rd floor or enjoying the world-class facilities, every detail is crafted to ensure a memorable stay in the heart of Kuching.

hotels.name: The Waterfront Hotel
hotels.location: 68, Jalan Tun Abang Haji Openg, Kuching City Center, 93000 Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia
features: Semi-outdoor infinity pool overlooking Padang Merdeka
hotels.description: Experience the ultimate blend of heritage and modern luxury at The Waterfront Hotel, an 'artrageous' sanctuary perched directly atop the Plaza Merdeka Shopping Centre. Our hotel invites you to relax in contemporary guest rooms and suites that boast some of the city's most breathtaking views, overlooking the historic Padang Merdeka and the scenic Sarawak River. Whether you are visiting for work or play, you can unwind in our unique semi-outdoor saltwater infinity pool on Level 4 or stay active in our 24-hour fitness centre.

Our hotel invites you to relax in contemporary guest rooms and suites that boast some of the city's most breathtaking views, overlooking the historic Sarawak River and the iconic golden dome of the State Assembly building. Whether you are visiting for work or play, you can unwind in our refreshing outdoor pool surrounded by lush greenery or stay active in our well-equipped fitness centre
